$comment: c16 shipped <dlfcn.h> + <sys/ioctl.h> on linux — dlopen/dlsym run on a real libc.so.6 (glibc 2.34+ merged libdl) + ioctl links; RTLD_NOW=2 (agrees) + RTLD_GLOBAL=256 (the ELF per-format constant variant). exit 42 iff the dl* + ioctl symbols resolve+run AND the elf RTLD_GLOBAL value was selected. RED-ON-DISABLE: a broken variant selector hands elf the macho value 8 != 256 → exit 1. Runs on the linux-gcc + native-arm64 legs. Release arm runs the optimizer over the loader calls.
